name: Integration - Retail Express & Oracle Netsuite
body: [{"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "We are pleased to announce the direct integration between Retail Express and Oracle Netsuite ERP."}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "The Retail Express Oracle integration bi-directionally synchronises key data between two platforms in near real-time, enabling you to:"}]}, {"type": "ul", "children": [{"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "Unify your B2B & B2C operations - wholesale, in-store and eCommerce"}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "Leverage all your stock across all channels to maximise sales"}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "Access powerful financial management and reporting capabilities"}]}]}]}, {"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "Orders synchronise between Retail Express and Netsuite to allow them to be fulfilled directly from your warehouse or dispatched to stores for Click & Collect"}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "Maintain optimal inventory levels within Netsuite with near real-time stock levels across stores and warehouses."}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "Netsuite becomes the single source of truth for inventory management and pricing, synchronised to all locations"}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "Centralised discounting, refunds, exchanges, store credits, in-store laybys and payment methods"}]}]}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": ""}]}, The data synchronised includes:"}]}, {"type": "ul", "children": [{"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "Vendors"}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "Sales"}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "Returns & refunds"}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "Fulfilment"}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "Transfers"}]}]}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": ""}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "For more information please contact the Sales Team on 1300 732 618, or by "}, {"type": "a", "url": "mailto:sales@retailexpress.com.au", "children": [{"text": "sales@retailexpress.com.au"}]}, {"text": "."}]}]
